name: Masonry grid

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to arrange unequal-height cards, portfolio thumbnails, or deliverables into a compact masonry wall, such as for portfolios, research moodboards, project delivery lists, and lightweight bento displays. It finds the current shortest position by column, avoiding the large gaps that ordinary CSS Grid leaves because of uniform row heights; use a table or data grid instead when records require strict row alignment, sorting/filtering, or selections sent back to AI.
en.why_valuable: AI-written absolute-position masonry easily overlaps after images load, containers resize, or card heights change; masonry-layout measures every item's true height, responds to width changes, and relayouts. This wrapper turns records directly into readable cards, supplies isolated shadow styles, responsive column widths, image-load relayout, and an empty state, while leaving layout to the mature upstream library.

data_in.note: data.items contains masonry records. title/body are written safely with textContent; html is raw HTML for trusted presentation fragments supplied by the consuming AI and must not receive unsanitized user input. img is assigned directly as the image src; strict hosts should use inline data: images. columns controls only wide-screen columns, while narrow screens automatically reduce to 2/1 columns.

schema.title?: string -- card-wall title; displays "Project wall" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- one line of context below the title; only the record count is shown when omitted
schema.items: {title?:string,body?:string,img?:string,tag?:string,html?:string}[] -- masonry items; img appears above content, tag renders as a compact label, title/body render as plain text, and html is appended as trusted rich content; an empty placeholder appears when all five are missing
schema.columns?: number -- wide-screen column count, rounded and clamped to 1-4, default 3; automatically at most 2 columns below 760px and 1 column below 500px
schema.gutter?: number -- horizontal and vertical item spacing in px, clamped to 8-32, default 16
schema.horizontalOrder?: boolean -- true favors preserving the input's horizontal reading order; default false fills the currently shortest column first

spec.note: Height expands to fit the masonry content after layout; 1-4 columns on wide screens automatically become 2/1 on narrow screens. No vh, percentage height, or carrier-size probing.

when_to_use: 需要把高低不一的卡片、作品缩略图或交付物排成紧凑的砖墙时用它：适合作品集、研究素材墙、项目交付清单和轻量 bento 展示。它按列寻找当前最短位置，能避免普通 CSS Grid 因统一行高留下的大块空白；如果记录必须按行严格对齐、需要排序筛选或需要向 AI 回传选择，应改用表格或数据网格。
why_valuable: AI 手写绝对定位砖墙容易在图片加载、容器缩放和卡片高度变化后互相覆盖；masonry-layout 会测量每块真实高度、响应宽度变化并重排。本包装把 records 直接变成可读卡片，补齐自有 shadow 样式、响应式列宽、图片加载重排和空态，同时仍把布局交给成熟上游。

data_in.note: data.items 是砖块记录。title/body 以 textContent 安全写入；html 是供消费 AI 放置可信展示片段的原始 HTML，不能接收未清洗的用户输入。img 直接设为图片 src，严格宿主建议使用 data: 内联图。columns 只控制宽屏列数，窄屏会自动降为 2/1 列。

schema.title?: string —— 整面卡片墙标题；省略时显示 “Project wall”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 标题下的一句上下文说明；省略时只显示记录数
schema.items: {title?:string,body?:string,img?:string,tag?:string,html?:string}[] —— 砖块数组；img 在内容上方，tag 显示为紧凑标签，title/body 用纯文本渲染，html 作为可信富内容追加；五项都缺失时显示空占位
schema.columns?: number —— 宽屏列数，取整后夹在 1–4，默认 3；小于 760px 自动至多 2 列，小于 500px 为 1 列
schema.gutter?: number —— 砖块横纵间距 px，夹在 8–32，默认 16
schema.horizontalOrder?: boolean —— true 时更偏向保持输入的水平阅读顺序；默认 false，优先填补当前最短列

spec.note: 高度由 Masonry 计算后的砖墙内容撑开；宽屏 1–4 列、窄屏自动 2/1 列。无 vh、百分比高度或载体尺寸探测。

minimal.title: Launch deliverables
minimal.subtitle: A compact wall for the assets, signals, and decisions shaping the release.

items.title: Narrative brief
items.body: Lead with the quiet confidence of a tool that removes friction. Three audience stories, one crisp promise, and no feature laundry list.

items.title: Motion study
items.body: A restrained 180 ms entrance, spring only on the primary reveal, and reduced-motion parity captured in the handoff.

items.html: “It feels finished before I even know where the controls are.”— BETA INTERVIEW 08

items.title: Release checklist
items.body: QA matrix signed off · accessibility pass complete · store copy localized · rollback owner confirmed.

uplink: display-only；本包装不监听卡片点击、不发送选择或改写 data。若消费 AI 需要交互，应在外层另建明确事件契约。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；7 个砖块形成 3 列、5 种高度、0 重叠，容器非空且无失败请求
carriers.widget: supported:boot.widget 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 parent=shadowRoot 原样渲染验证；7 个砖块形成 3 列、5 种高度、0 重叠，包装样式保留在自有 shadow root
carriers.codex: supported:boot.codex 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；只有 7 个 jsDelivr ESM 模块请求，无运行时主题、字体或图片资产 fetch

isolation.evidence: masonry-layout@4.2.2 /+esm 尾部确认 default export 为 Masonry。实例只测量并写入传入 grid 及其 .tile 子项的 position/transform/尺寸，不向 head/body 插入节点；包装 CSS 只进入自有 shadow。Outlayer 为响应式重排在 window 上注册 resize 监听，并在 destroy() 路径可解除；本条是一份持续展示实例。artifact/widget/codex 三份 boot 均以 sandboxed iframe 实测：7 个砖块、3 列、5 种高度、0 重叠、无失败请求。example 仅用内联 SVG/HTML，不请求字体、主题、i18n 或图片资产。
